LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-29-2024 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF MISAEL ROSAS FRAGA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT" IS GRANTED. PER THE PROPOSED DATE IN PLAINTIFF'S SUBMITTED PROPOSED ORDER, THE COURT SETS A FINAL APPROVAL HEARING FOR FEBRUARY 27, 2025 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 301, FINAL APPROVAL HEARING: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS AND PAGA ACTION SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 12, 2025. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF'S MOVING PAPERS REFER TO THE DECLARATION OF CASSANDRA POLITES OF ILYM GROUP, INC., THAT DECLARATION DOES NOT APPEAR TO HAVE BEEN FILED. BASED ON THE MOVING PAPERS, THIS DECLARATION APPEARS TO SUPPLY INFORMATION UPON PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE ABOUT THE ACTUAL MAILING OF NOTICE TO CLASS MEMBERS AND ANY RESPONSES; IT IS INFORMATION THE COURT REQUIRES BEFORE APPROVAL MAY BE GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE MISSING DECLARATION FORTHWITH AND BY NO LATER THAN MARCH 5, 2025. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

LAW AND MOTION 301, FINAL APPROVAL HEARING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL WILL BE GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS LODGED WITH THE COURT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT BUT THE COURT REQUIRES AN ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL TO ACCOMPANY THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A DETAILED PROPOSED ORDER, FOLLOWING THE PROCEDURES OF CRC 3.1312, TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE WITH THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. THE PROPOSED ORDER SHOULD SET SEPTEMBER 12, 2025 FOR THE FINAL CASE REVIEW AND CLASS COUNSEL SHALL FILE A FINAL REPORT AND DECLARATION REGARDING DISTRIBUTION BY FIVE COURT DAYS IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.

The unopposed motion for final approval will be granted. Plaintiff has lodged with the court a proposed judgment but the court requires an order granting final approval to accompany the judgment. Plaintiff shall provide a detailed proposed order, following the procedures of CRC 3.1312, to the court for signature with the proposed judgment. The proposed order should set September 12, 2025 for the final case review and class counsel shall file a final report and declaration regarding distribution by five court days in advance of the hearing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class And Paga Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MISAEL ROSAS FRAGA, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class And Paga Action Settlement. *Duplicate*

See ruling on plaintiffs motion for final approval.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-27-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for final approval of class and PAGA action settlement is continued to March 12, 2025. Although Plaintiff's moving papers refer to the Declaration of Cassandra Polites of ILYM Group, Inc., that declaration does not appear to have been filed. Based on the moving papers, this declaration appears to supply information upon personal knowledge about the actual mailing of notice to class members and any responses; it is information the court requires before approval may be granted. The court orders Plaintiff to file the missing declaration forthwith and by no later than March 5, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ENZO NABIEV, Esq. of Moon Law Group, PC (Tel: 213-232-3128) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MISAEL ROSAS FRAGA's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted.

Per the proposed date in plaintiff's submitted proposed order, the Court sets a Final Approval Hearing for February 27, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
